Motivation — what problem does this solve?

High-level approach. Note any design decisions or trade-offs.

## Testing

- [ ] `go build ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes

- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
